hero.title: Resources of Development
hero.subtitle: A leading company in training and institutional development
about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Who We Are
about.desc: Resources of Development is a leading company in the field of training and institutional development, providing integrated solutions to enhance human competencies and develop organizations. We believe that investing in people is the greatest and most sustainable investment.
about.accred_desc: Accredited according to the highest standards in organizational management and institutional performance by the International Accreditation Organization IAO.
about.iso_desc: Certified with the ISO Quality Management Systems standard ISO 9001:2015.
services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Why Choose Us?
services.s1_desc: A fully equipped team delivering professional training to the highest standards.
services.s2_desc: Specialized programs to develop institutions and raise institutional performance.
services.s3_desc: Specialized consulting in management, human resources, and development.
services.s4_desc: Internationally accredited programs granting globally recognized certificates.
services.s5_desc: We provide all logistical support services for the training process.
services.s6_desc: A team of highly competent experts and specialists.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.address: Benghazi - Libya, Venice Street, next to Venice Hospital
